metadata.description: Official Porter Metrics marketplace for Claude — install the Porter connector (MCP server + skill) so Claude can pull your live marketing data, build reports and run actions.

plugins.name: porter-metrics
plugins.description: Connect Claude to Porter Metrics in one step: the Porter MCP server (live marketing data from 25+ ad platforms, blends, hosted reports, 750+ actions and AI creative) plus a skill that teaches Claude to use it correctly. Permission prompts for *.portermetrics.com are pre-approved so routine Porter tasks don't interrupt you.
